---
title: "Reproducible Research @ AGILE"
description: "Practices and tools for open and reproducible research in GIScience"
categories: [training courses]
image: https://reproducible-agile.github.io/public/images/reproducible-AGILE-logo-square.svg
fields: [image, title, description]
---


::: {.column-margin}

![](https://reproducible-agile.github.io/public/images/reproducible-AGILE-logo-square.svg)

:::

The [Reproducible Research @ AGILE](https://reproducible-agile.github.io/) website hosts the workshop series on reproducible research practices in GIScience collocated in the [AGILE conference series](https://agile-gi.eu/), the AGILE Reproducible Reviews held at each  AGILE conference since 2020n, and related publications.
